temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man with a serious expression, wearing a light blue shirt and a striped tie, sits in an office chair. He holds a clear plastic evidence bag containing a black wallet. (Storyline: The scene introduces a character who is examining a piece of evidence, setting a serious and investigative tone.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, and dramatic musical score begins to play.)
(00:02-00:05) A close-up shot reveals the contents of the evidence bag. Inside is a black wallet with a Hong Kong ID card for 'WONG Chi-sang' lying on top of a crumpled, blood-stained piece of paper. (Storyline: The discovery of a bloody ID card belonging to a specific person, Wong Chi-sang, is revealed, escalating the mystery and suggesting a violent event has occurred.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, dramatic music continues.)
